[{"title": "AI Detector - Advanced AI Checker for ChatGPT, GPT-5 & Gemini", "url": "https://quillbot.com/ai-content-detector", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] ### Edit content ![Image 6: Optimize content after AI Detection](https://assets.quillbot.com/pageq/QBWebapp/aidr-steps-1.png) **Interpret results:** Review any highlighted sections of text. **Revise text:** Rewrite any AI-generated sections if needed. **Re-scan:**Run another scan to double-check your revisions. ### Certify your human-written content ![Image 7](https://assets.quillbot.com/pageq/QBWebapp/content-certification-light.svg) If you\u2019re a site owner or blogger, get a QuillBot certificate for your published page and add a verification badge to your site. Build trust with readers, reduce AI skepticism, and keep proof of authenticity one click away. [Get certified](https://quillbot.com/content-certification) ## Why choose QuillBot's AI Detector Our AI detector doesn\u2019t just identify text generated by tools like ChatGPT, GPT-4, GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and other large language models. It also detects text refined with paraphrasers or grammar checkers-including our own-because it\u2019s continuously trained on evolving AI text patterns. If your content is flagged as AI-generated, you can revise it for a more natural tone or use our [Humanize AI](https://quillbot.com/ai-humanizer)tool to make your writing sound more authentic and human. Here's what else sets our AI checker apart. ### Detailed analysis Know exactly which part of the text appears to be AI-generated ### High accuracy Advanced models for highly accurate results ### Downloadable reports Download in-depth PDF reports for every detection ### Multilingual support Supports all languages with accurate detection ### Fast Receive your AI detection report within seconds ## The Technology Behind QuillBot\u2019s AI Detector QuillBot\u2019s AI Detector analyzes patterns to estimate the likelihood that a text is human written or AI generated. Instead of flagging individual words, our detector notices structural signals like repetition, generic language, and lack of variation in tone. Our detector works because it is trained on large sets of human- and AI-written texts generated using models like GPT-4, GPT-5, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and other modern large language models. It uses metrics such as perplexity (how predictable the text is) and burstiness (how much sentence length varies) to identify writing patterns typical of machines. When the result is unclear, our model tends to classify texts as human written, which reduces false positives. For the most accurate results, analyze your entire text at once, and make sure it meets the length requirement. Always interpret results in light of your own knowledge. For every text, you\u2019ll get a probability score that suggests its likely source. As with any AI detector, this score is not a guarantee, but it is a useful signal when authorship matters. ## An AI detector that\u2019s perfect for any project Supporting writers at top institutions ![Image 8](https://assets.quillbot.com/pageq/QBWebapp/aidr-institute-logo.png)", "relevance_score": 0.8}, {"title": "Unlocking BetterDocumentRetrievalwith Sequential Latching...", "url": "https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/unlocking-better-document-retrieval-sequential-latching-singh-sf9jc", "snippet": "[Jina Extracted Content] Title: Unlocking Better Document Retrieval with Sequential Latching & Dynamic Context Window Optimization URL Source: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/unlocking-better-document-retrieval-sequential-latching-singh-sf9jc Published Time: 2025-04-02T07:30:36.000+00:00 Markdown Content: # Unlocking Better Document Retrieval with Sequential Latching & Dynamic Context Window Optimization Agree & Join LinkedIn By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn\u2019s [User Agreement](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/user-agreement?trk=linkedin-tc_auth-button_user-agreement), [Privacy Policy](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/privacy-policy?trk=linkedin-tc_auth-button_privacy-policy), and [Cookie Policy](https://www.linkedin.com/legal/cookie-policy?trk=linkedin-tc_auth-button_cookie-policy). ![Image 1](https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/unlocking-better-document-retrieval-sequential-latching-singh-sf9jc) ## Join now to view more content Create your free account or sign in to continue your search  Email or phone    Password   [Forgot password?](https://www.linkedin.com/uas/request-password-reset?trk=csm-v2_forgot_password) Sign in  [Join with email](https://www.linkedin.com/signup/cold-join?session_redirect=%2Fpulse%2Funlocking-better-document-retrieval-sequential-latching-singh-sf9jc&trk=pulse-article_contextual-sign-in-modal_join-with-email-cta) Already on LinkedIn? These optional cookies will only be used with your consent.
